programmes.show_description: Alison has her work cut out with a giddy bulldog cross pup, a lively Frenchie needs to rest after a leg injury, and a Bernese mountain dog fears almost everything.
Alison meets a rare Romanian Mioritic Shepherd with a fear of stairs and doorways, and there is chaos when a van with seven Belgian Shepherd cross puppies arrives.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Chef Tom Kerridge is in Andalucia to discover the secrets behind sherry vinegar, a regional speciality, and trendy avocados before celebrating the ingredients.
Chef Tom Kerridge journeys across the heart of Spain to discover the secrets behind garlic and grapes before cooking up delicious dishes that celebrate them.
Adil Ray hosts the game of words as Good Morning Britain's Charlotte Hawkins and Sean Fletcher go head-to-head with Cold Feet legends Fay Ripley and John Thomson for charity.
Alan and the team create a garden celebrating all things textural for a hard-working support worker from Leicester, who looks after young single mothers.

programmes.show_name: Love Your Weekend with Alan Titchmarsh
programmes.show_description: Joining Alan at Manor Farm are Tessa Peake-Jones, Adam Garcia, and Phil Daniels as we visit a farm helping adults with disabilities and autism through nature.
National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world.
James celebrates the Easter weekend of 2026 with Patsy Kensit - who talks about a new series of Pilgrimage - chefs Ryan and Liam Simpson-Trotman and Lisa Goodwin-Allen, and forager Alysia Vasey.
Hillsborough: Raymond visits Hillsborough Castle and Gardens - the official royal residence in Northern Ireland - and learns about both of their histories.
Birmingham: James visits the capital of the balti - Birmingham - and meets acclaimed food critic, broadcaster and author Grace Dent as he takes to a narrow boat.
National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world.
Oli Bell presents coverage of live racing from Musselburgh and Haydock. The feature meeting of the day is the flat card at Musselburgh where the Queen's Cup is the highlight.

Aisling Bea, Chris Packham and Kate Lawler join Stephen Mulhern for Celebrity Catchphrase, hoping to ‘say what they see’ and guess well-known phrases for a chance to win £50,000 for their charity.
The auditions continue as further acts take to the stage with performances to impress the crowd and judges as they try to win themselves a coveted space in the semi-finals.
Celebs take on 'The Great Kitchen Cook Off’, a fake cookery-themed show hosted by Celebrity Chef Monica Galetti, who is totally in on the whole thing.
Find out how clever you are as Lee Mack presents the quiz where it doesn't matter how good you are at quizzes and where 100 contestants could win up to 100,000 pounds.

Giant reptile and giant gorilla thrash it out - with humanity caught in the balance. Don't miss the action-adventure sequel starring Alexander Skarsgård & Millie Bobby Brown.

programmes.show_name: Willy Wonka and the Chocolate Factory
programmes.show_description: Gene Wilder is the eccentric recluse in Roald Dahl's 70s classic. When he offers the chance to tour his chocolate factory, no one wants it more than young Charlie Bucket.

Three more famous faces join Ben Shephard in the hope of winning 20,000 pounds for charity - taking on the machine this time are comedian Roisin Conaty and TV presenting pals Chris Bavin and Jordan Banjo.
All that stands between Callum from Nuneaton, Miriam from Lancashire, Hyder from Glasgow, Linda from London and thousands of pounds is the small matter of one of the Chasers.

Ben forces Maggie to reveal that Alan was not his father - but can she keep Jim McDonald a secret? Meanwhile, Debbie encounters Carl upon her release from custody, and Sam reluctantly accepts Will's apology.

Simon Pegg stars in this smash-hit comedy thriller. A hot-shot young London cop is sent to a quiet rural posting but uncovers a seedy hotbed of murderous mayhem.
